DISCOVERY 610, AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING IS MODIFIED. PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AND PACIFIC NATIONAL BANK'S MOTIONS. (1) MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT WILLIAM JARVIS TO PROVIDE FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST SET OF FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. (2) MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT WILLIAM JARVIS TO PROVIDE FURTHER RES PONSES AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST SET OF REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. (3) DEFENDANT WILLIAM JARVIS HAS WAIVED HIS OBJECTIONS TO THE PRODUCTION OF REQUESTS NOS. 31 AND 32, AND SHALL PRODUCE INCOME FINANCIAL STATEMENTS AND TAX RETURNS FROM 2008 TO THE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. PROPOSED ORDER WILL BE SUBMITTED BY PARTIES. JUDGE: MONICA A. WILEY, NOT REPORTED.
